description:
Sun Salutations modified for the chair will safely stretch sore back muscles and strengthen the core muscles that support your spine.

Modified for the chair, Stronger Seniors Yoga was created for seniors and those with limited mobility.

Chair Yoga for seniors  incorporates all of the benefits of yoga-

A healthier, stronger and more relaxed you

Improved flexibility

A great sense of calm and well-being

Increased oxygen intake (better respiration)

No getting down on the floor, no 'pretzel' poses. Just increased flexibility, mobility, and relaxation. If you have heard how wonderful Yoga is, but always thought it was too difficult, now is your time to experience this amazing age-old practice.

www.StrongerSeniors.com
tags: chair exercise for lower back pain

chapters.title: squeeze and contract the deep pelvic floor muscles
roll up onto your balls of your feet
bring your arms in front of your heart
